answer:
The updated will is found by Mr. Apjohn and Mr. Brodrick, who discover it hidden in a book of sermons during a visit to Henry Jones. Henry had previously found the document but failed to destroy it, and his ineffectual efforts to stop them were unsuccessful. Thus, the will is uncovered by the lawyer and Isabel's father.

\boxed{\text{Mr. Apjohn and Mr. Brodrick}}
